{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/02-anthropic-vacancies/167-ai-mediated-representation-for-underrepresented-ex.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations"
tags:
  * collaboration
  * anthropic-vacancies
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations


{quote}- Open Knowledge Work Foundation Concept Document v1.0{quote}

----





h2. AI-Mediated Representation for Underrepresented Experts and Vulnerable Populations

_Companion paper to:_
* Open Knowledge Work Foundation Concept Document v1.0
* Double-Triangle Architecture v1.0
* Nautilus Portal Protocol v1.1

_Version:_ 1.0.0-draft  
_Date:_ 2026-04-19  
_Author:_ svend4  
_Editorial collaboration:_ Claude  
_License:_ CC BY 4.0  
_Status:_ Working paper, seeking reviewers and collaborators

----



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [[251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl]] (сходство 0.62)
* [[209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-]] (сходство 0.62)
* [[135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr]] (сходство 0.40)




----

_Смотрите также:_
* [[209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-]]
* [[251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl]]
* [[135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr]]
* [[152-ai-coordinated-infrastructure-for-distributed-expe]]


h2. Упоминается в

* [[135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr|A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work]]
* [[209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers]]
* [[251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl|AI Support Through Configurable Specialist Ensembles]]
* [[152-ai-coordinated-infrastructure-for-distributed-expe|AI-Coordinated Infrastructure for Distributed Expert Contribution]]
* [[146-acknowledgments|Acknowledgments]]
* [[182-acknowledgments|Acknowledgments]]
* [[224-acknowledgments|Acknowledgments]]
* [[226-appendix-a-comparative-table-five-agent-types|Appendix A: Comparative Table — Five Agent Types]]
* [[184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers|Appendix A: Connection to Companion Papers]]
* [[52-author-contact|Author & Contact]]
* [[03-portal-protocol-md|PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md]]
* [[73-portal-protocol-md-v1-1|PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md v1.1]]
* [[183-references|References]]
* [[268-references|References]]
* [[137-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]]
* [[274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code|The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code]]
* [[306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform|with Anthropic's Cowork Platform]]
* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]
h2. Упоминается в

* [[README|Вакансии Anthropic — Анализ по кластерам]]


h2. Связанные документы

* [[135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr|A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work]] _37%_
* [[137-table-of-contents|Table of Contents]] _33%_
* [[146-acknowledgments|Acknowledgments]] _33%_
* [[184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers|Appendix A: Connection to Companion Papers]] _29%_
* [[224-acknowledgments|Acknowledgments]] _29%_
* [[274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code|The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code]] _29%_
* [[306-with-anthropic-s-cowork-platform|with Anthropic's Cowork Platform]] _29%_
* [[355-существующие-документы-dhlab-твой-context|Существующие документы DHLab (твой context)]] _29%_
h2. Связанные документы

* [[146-acknowledgments|Acknowledgments]] _48%_
* [[209-a-typology-of-ai-agents-on-the-principal-side-and-|A Typology of AI Agents on the Principal Side and the Case for Profession-Specific Co-Workers]] _48%_
* [[251-ai-support-through-configurable-specialist-ensembl|AI Support Through Configurable Specialist Ensembles]] _48%_
* [[184-appendix-a-connection-to-companion-papers|Appendix A: Connection to Companion Papers]] _42%_
* [[274-the-missing-middle-layer-between-chat-and-code|The Missing Middle Layer Between Chat and Code]] _42%_
* [[152-ai-coordinated-infrastructure-for-distributed-expe|AI-Coordinated Infrastructure for Distributed Expert Contribution]] _37%_
* [[73-portal-protocol-md-v1-1|PORTAL-PROTOCOL.md v1.1]] _37%_
* [[135-a-formal-model-for-human-ai-collaboration-in-distr|A Formal Model for Human-AI Collaboration in Distributed Knowledge Work]] _33%_
